title: Strange Signals: The Murder of Julie Pacey

scenes.text: A tragic murder that left mysteries in its wake.
Julie Pacey was murdered in New Hampshire, leaving a haunting legacy.
The circumstances surrounding her murder remain unresolved decades later.
Julie’s case remains one of New Hampshire's most perplexing mysteries.
scenes.label: PERPLEXING MYSTERY

scenes.text: Follow for the cases no one can explain.

description: 📍 New Hampshire, United States - 1993. The murder of Julie Pacey still looms in the shadows, with unresolved mysteries that haunt the community. Follow for daily mysteries!
